hooks.command: command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' 'WP task complete' --icon=dialog-information || osascript -e 'display notification "WP task complete" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name BurntToast) { Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'WP task complete' }" 2>/dev/null || true
echo '{"context": "Bash command failed. Check PHP syntax, file permissions, or missing vendor/bin. Suggest: cd to plugin root and verify composer install."}'
